data.name: Don't Let Your Dad Find Out
data.detailed_description:
You’re in the middle of a beautiful love story with an attractive woman. The problem? That woman is your stepmother!
Throughout a series of levels, you’ll need to find a way to keep your father away from you both so you can unleash your passion without anyone standing in your way. Make him get called into work, start an argument with a neighbor, put him to sleep by slipping sleeping pills into his food, or even give him laxatives so he locks himself in the bathroom while you have fun with your stepmother—why not? Each level will have a different way to deal with him. Find them all!
And once you succeed, go talk to your stepmother to claim your well-deserved reward. You know what they say: duty first, then devotion!

  • Exploration and Puzzles: Explore a high-quality environment as you search for clues and tricks to get your father out of the way.

  • Random Levels: More than 10 puzzle stages. You won’t know what’s coming next until you’ve become an expert at removing your father from the picture.

  • Sex Scenes: Over 10 different sex scenes throughout the house between you and your stepmother. Enjoy a well-deserved reward once you manage to be alone with her. As you unlock them, you’ll be able to view them in the gallery anytime you like.

data.short_description: Find ingenious ways to throw your father from home and have crazy and unbridled sex with your own stepmother without your father caught you!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i7 4790k or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i9 9900k or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i7 4790k or greater
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11
  • Processor: i9 9900k or greater
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
